contentBody.headMarkup:
<title>Venkata Chaitanya Bhimisetty — Salesforce Developer</title>
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="/sfsites/c/resource/favicon"/>
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="/sfsites/c/resource/favicon"/>
<meta property="og:title" content="Venkata Chaitanya Bhimisetty — Salesforce Developer"/>
<meta property="og:description" content="Salesforce Developer · 6+ years · Apex, LWC, Flows, integrations. Portfolio built on Salesforce (Experience Cloud LWR + Apex + LWC)."/>
<meta property="og:image" content="https://chap-dev-ed.my.site.com/sfsites/c/resource/profilePhoto"/>
<meta property="og:type" content="website"/>
<meta property="og:url" content="https://chap-dev-ed.my.site.com/"/>
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary"/>
<meta name="description" content="Salesforce Developer portfolio — Apex, LWC, Flows, and integrations. Built on Salesforce."/>
<style>html,body{min-height:100%}html{background:#f3f5fc !important;scroll-behavior:smooth}body{margin:0;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;background:radial-gradient(15rem 15rem at 72% 5%, rgba(150,190,255,0.4) 0 49%, transparent 50%),radial-gradient(11rem 11rem at 12% 30%, rgba(190,160,250,0.34) 0 49%, transparent 50%),radial-gradient(13rem 13rem at 55% 97%, rgba(130,200,235,0.34) 0 49%, transparent 50%),radial-gradient(40rem 38rem at 16% 6%, rgba(120,170,255,0.5), transparent 64%),radial-gradient(36rem 34rem at 88% 14%, rgba(190,150,255,0.42), transparent 62%),radial-gradient(32rem 30rem at 6% 60%, rgba(255,170,205,0.3), transparent 58%),radial-gradient(38rem 36rem at 94% 74%, rgba(120,215,230,0.34), transparent 60%),radial-gradient(46rem 42rem at 50% 110%, rgba(140,180,255,0.42), transparent 64%),linear-gradient(180deg,#f6f8ff 0%,#f1f4fb 100%) !important}@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){html{scroll-behavior:auto}}</style>
